title: YRT – Touched Features
description: Generate a specific supernatural feature for a Touched character.

data.value: Eyes: animal pupils (slitted, horizontal, or multi-faceted).
Eyes: reflective like a predator's; glow faintly in low light.
Ears: elongated, furred, or reshaped to reflect the animal aspect.
Jaw / teeth: altered dentition suited to the animal's diet (fangs, flat grinders, or beak-like ridges).
Nose / face: reshaped muzzle, snout, or sensory organ reflecting the animal aspect.
Hands: nails thickened into claws, talons, or chitinous tips.
Feet: altered stance or structure suited to the animal's mode of movement.
Arms: subtly elongated or reshaped to match the animal's forelimbs.
Legs: sinewy and springy; built for leaping, sprinting, or the animal's favored motion.
Skin / hide: patches of fur, scales, chitin, or coarse bristles in key areas.
Tail: vestigial or functional appendage reflecting the animal's tail or stinger.
Back / spine: visible ridges, spines, plates, or a raised line of fur or quills.
Extremities: hands, feet, or digits partially altered — webbed, fused, padded, or clawed — reflecting the animal's limb structure.
Smell: strong animal musk, venom-tang, or an odor characteristic of the animal aspect.
Voice: rasping growl, chirp, hiss, buzz, or other animal vocalization bleeds into speech.
Hearing: reacts to sounds beyond human range; ears twitch, tilt, or orient toward sounds.
Vision: well-suited to the animal's conditions (dark, ultraviolet, motion-sensitive) but poorly adapted to others.
Gait: loping, prowling, skittering, or undulating movement; rarely fully upright or still.
Posture: head cocks, shoulders hunch, or limbs splay in a way that echoes the animal's resting stance.
Reflexes: sudden, animal-quick flinches, pounces, or threat displays.
Aura: others feel subtly watched, warned away, or drawn — as one might feel near the animal itself.
Mind: instincts tug toward behaviors of the animal aspect — pack, herd, solitary, territorial, or migratory.
Hybrid: two lesser traits bleed together (roll twice and blend).
